settings.heading: Custom church shirts, polos and event apparel.
settings.lead: Create apparel for ministries, volunteers, outreach events, youth groups, retreats and fundraising campaigns.
settings.body:
L F Graphco helps churches and faith-based groups build apparel around events, volunteer teams, staff uniforms and community outreach. Use screen printing for event shirts, embroidery for polos and hats, DTF for detailed full-color artwork and promo products for giveaways.

Send your design idea, group size, event date and apparel preferences to request a quote.
settings.features: Volunteer Shirts,Youth Groups,Retreat Apparel,Embroidered Polos,Outreach Events

settings.heading: Get artwork reviewed before the church event.
settings.intro: Share your logo, theme, scripture reference or design notes. L F Graphco can help turn the idea into a quote-ready apparel project.

settings.heading: Church apparel can use screen printing, embroidery, DTF and promo products.
settings.intro: Quote volunteer shirts, staff polos, youth apparel, event giveaways and fundraiser merchandise in one place.

settings.heading: Tell us about the ministry, event and deadline.
settings.intro: Send the project basics and the team will help you choose the right decoration method and next step.
